note: DEX crypto test FIX — sostcore.com/dex-crypto-test.html was failing on load with 'libsodium-wrappers not loaded'. Cause: the script tag pointed at dist/modules/libsodium-wrappers.js, which is the ESM/Node.js module entry, not the browser global. browser-crypto.js needs the IIFE build that exposes window.sodium. Fix: changed the CDN path to dist/browsers/sodium.js (the browser-IIFE build of libsodium-wrappers@0.7.15). No other website changes. Phase 2 dormancy unchanged — V11_PHASE2_HEIGHT remains INT64_MAX. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
